title: 'I wish I could kill 300,000,000 Americans': FBI arrests three men accused of funding ISIS weapons
description: The FBI arrested three men on Friday on charges of conspiring to provide material support to the Islamic State (ISIS), according to a statement from the United States Department of Justice (DOJ). Bisaam Ghafoor, 21, Elias Shamsaldeen, 21, and Bereen Dzayee, 2…
